explanations.38: When layout is 'small', we apply no CSS class (empty string), otherwise we use the date style from our CSS module.
explanations.46: We're converting the date string into a JavaScript Date object, then formatting it as a readable string like 'January 15, 2024'.
explanations.68: We're extracting specific fields from the post object using destructuring, so we can use them as simple variables instead of post.permalink, post.image, etc.
explanations.73: The 'col col--4' class makes this card take up 4 columns in a 12-column grid layout (Infima CSS framework).
explanations.98: Setting flex: 1 makes the card body grow to fill available space, pushing the footer button to the bottom.
explanations.136: The Link component here uses 'href' instead of 'to' (line 100 uses 'to'), which is inconsistent but both work in Docusaurus—'to' is preferred for internal links.
explanations.137: The '→' arrow character is a visual indicator that this is a link to read the full article.
